'''thozasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ziggy|ziggy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ziggy|ziggy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thozasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thozasithi|thozasithi]] || [[word:thozasiji|thozasiji]] || [[word:thozasishi|thozasishi]] || [[word:thozasiki|thozasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thozasuthuthu|thozasuthuthu]] || [[word:thozasujuju|thozasujuju]] || [[word:thozasushushu|thozasushushu]] || [[word:thozasukuku|thozasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozasuthu|thozasuthu]] || [[word:thozasuju|thozasuju]] || [[word:thozasushu|thozasushu]] || [[word:thozasuku|thozasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozasufthuf|thozasufthuf]] || [[word:thozasufjuf|thozasufjuf]] || [[word:thozasufshuf|thozasufshuf]] || [[word:thozasufkuf|thozasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thozasethe|thozasethe]] || [[word:thozaseje|thozaseje]] || [[word:thozaseshe|thozaseshe]] || [[word:thozaseke|thozaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thozasothotho|thozasothotho]] || [[word:thozasojojo|thozasojojo]] || [[word:thozasoshosho|thozasoshosho]] || [[word:thozasokoko|thozasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozasotho|thozasotho]] || [[word:thozasojo|thozasojo]] || [[word:thozasosho|thozasosho]] || [[word:thozasoko|thozasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozasofthof|thozasofthof]] || [[word:thozasofjof|thozasofjof]] || [[word:thozasofshof|thozasofshof]] || [[word:thozasofkof|thozasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfthĂŻf|thozasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfjĂŻf|thozasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfshĂŻf|thozasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfkĂŻf|thozasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thozasĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thozasĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thozasĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thozasĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfthĂŻf|thozasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfjĂŻf|thozasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfshĂŻf|thozasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfkĂŻf|thozasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfthĂŻf|thozasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfjĂŻf|thozasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfshĂŻf|thozasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thozasĂŻfkĂŻf|thozasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thozasĂŠthĂŠ|thozasĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thozasĂŠjĂŠ|thozasĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thozasĂŠshĂŠ|thozasĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thozasĂŠkĂŠ|thozasĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thozasathatha|thozasathatha]] || [[word:thozasajaja|thozasajaja]] || [[word:thozasashasha|thozasashasha]] || [[word:thozasakaka|thozasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozasatha|thozasatha]] || [[word:thozasaja|thozasaja]] || [[word:thozasasha|thozasasha]] || [[word:thozasaka|thozasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozasafthaf|thozasafthaf]] || [[word:thozasafjaf|thozasafjaf]] || [[word:thozasafshaf|thozasafshaf]] || [[word:thozasafkaf|thozasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thozasasha|thozasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thozashĂ«sha|thozashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thozasrosha|thozasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thozasmusha|thozasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thozasyasha|thozasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothozasnkshĂ«sha|gothozasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothozasnkrosha|gothozasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothozasnkmusha|gothozasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothozasnkyasha|gothozasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thozazasasha|thozazasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thozazashĂ«sha|thozazashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thozazasrosha|thozazasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thozazasmusha|thozazasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thozazasyasha|thozazasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothozazasnkshĂ«sha|gothozazasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothozazasnkrosha|gothozazasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothozazasnkmusha|gothozazasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothozazasnkyasha|gothozazasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thezĂŠsasha|thezĂŠsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thezĂŠshĂ«sha|thezĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thezĂŠsrosha|thezĂŠsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thezĂŠsmusha|thezĂŠsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thezĂŠsyasha|thezĂŠsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothezĂŠsnkshĂ«sha|gothezĂŠsnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothezĂŠsnkrosha|gothezĂŠsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothezĂŠsnkmusha|gothezĂŠsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothezĂŠsnkyasha|gothezĂŠsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thozfasasha|thozfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thozfashĂ«sha|thozfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thozfasrosha|thozfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thozfasmusha|thozfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thozfasyasha|thozfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothozfasnkshĂ«sha|gothozfasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothozfasnkrosha|gothozfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothozfasnkmusha|gothozfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothozfasnkyasha|gothozfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
